transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Hello, Priya Sharma. This is your doctor speaking.

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Okay. How long have you been having this fever for?

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Okay. How bad is your throat inflection?

transcript.speaker: doctor
transcript.text: Can you describe the severity of your headache?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: I cannot sleep because of fever, doctor.

subjective: Patient reports having a fever for three days
Patient has a throat infection, making it difficult to swallow food
Patient experiences headache and fever, affecting sleep
plan: Further evaluation and treatment of throat infection and fever are needed

aiSummary.narrative: The patient, Priya Sharma, presented with a fever for three days, a throat infection, and a headache, which are affecting her ability to swallow food and sleep. There is no discussion about adjusting her current medications (Budesonide-Formoterol 200/6 mcg BD, Montelukast 10mg OD) during this consultation.
warnings: Caution is advised when prescribing any new medications due to patient's allergies to Aspirin and NSAIDs
